title: deepsap-tsjs-nf samplesheet schema
description: Documents the 'sample,bam' samplesheet format. Provided for reference and for future use with nf-schema's samplesheetToList(); the pipeline currently validates the samplesheet itself via splitCsv in workflows/deepsap_tsjs.nf -- see README 'What I could not verify' for why.

sample.description: Sample identifier. Used as meta.id and as the DeepSAP --prefix for this sample's outputs.

bam.description: Path to an existing BAM or SAM file to score. DeepSAP's -s/--sam flag is documented as accepting 'the SAM/BAM file' -- CRAM input is not confirmed and is not accepted here.
